requiredEvidence.notes: Public copy must avoid purchase/provisioning overclaim.

requiredEvidence.notes: Quarantined routes must not be public CTA targets.

requiredEvidence.name: quality gates passed
requiredEvidence.expectedArtifact: Quality outputs from Web, Runtime and Launcher
requiredEvidence.observedArtifact: Launcher gates run in this PR; external gates pending
requiredEvidence.validationCommand: npm run -s quality plus external equivalents
requiredEvidence.notes: All owning repos must provide command output.

requiredEvidence.name: post-merge smoke captured
requiredEvidence.notes: Required after merge before global freeze.

decisionRules: If any required Web/Runtime/Launcher item is missing, status must be freeze_blocked.
If Launcher L01 is verified but Web/Runtime evidence is not accessible in this repository, status must be freeze_candidate_pending_external_evidence.
If all required evidence is verified and smoke passes, status may be freeze_ready.
Never claim freeze_ready from docs alone.
Never claim freeze_ready if any validator is marker-only.
Never claim freeze_ready if any component claims live execution without gated evidence.
pendingExternalEvidence: Web W01-W05 PR or audit evidence
Web production smoke for public routes
Runtime B01-B05 PR or audit evidence
Runtime quality or audit command output
